name: agentic-kanban
description: Kanban board for managing AI-driven coding tasks — each card is a Claude Code session with built-in diff review and merge

scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && node scripts/build-server.mjs && node scripts/build-mcp.mjs && pnpm --filter client build && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter agentic-kanban exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @agentic-kanban/mcp-server exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed && pnpm cli -- register .
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently "pnpm --filter agentic-kanban dev" "pnpm --filter client dev" "pnpm --filter @agentic-kanban/desktop dev"
